# Skill: Documentation Governance

## Purpose
Ensure technical documentation remains synchronized with planned and implemented feature changes.

## Rules
1. Any architecture-impacting feature must include doc updates.
2. No feature considered complete without doc update tasks.
3. Contract changes must be reflected in `hw-sw-contract.md`.
4. Structural changes must be reflected in `repository-map.md`.
5. Behavioral architecture changes must be reflected in `current-architecture.md`.

## Required Checks
- Planned docs to update are listed before implementation.
- Post-implementation prompt enforces doc updates.
- Final validation checks doc/code consistency.
